title: Great British sell-off? UK takeovers accelerate in a big way
summary_full: Last week, three British companies accepted takeover bids on the same day. It's a growing trend, but can the U.K. really afford to let such companies go?
summary_public: Last week, three British companies accepted takeover bids on the same day. It's a growing trend, but can the U.K. really afford to let such companies go?

GB.label: neutral
GB.evidence: UK takeovers accelerate in a big way
